limitations: Parser roster exposes player display names in the heroName/heroClass field path for this compact output.
The participant packet is advisory human evidence, independent from parser output but not independent from the match origin.

evidence: Parser roster maps participant name Aresius to raw team value 3.

Human packet reports Archmother team taking Rejuvenator charges.
limitations: This maps raw team values to named factions only; it does not identify Walker lanes.
Human participant evidence is advisory and cannot validate exact coordinates.

evidence: Replay 009 roster has exactly two raw teams with six players each.

Human packet refers to Hidden King as enemy.
